zh.lifeSummary: 當Elen Franklen於1575年出生在威爾士格拉莫爾根斯萊德時，她的父親Thomas Franklen29歲，母親Jonet Delamare25歲。她於大約1594年與Francis Bowen在威爾士格拉莫爾根利朗尼斯結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1638年在她的家鄉享年63歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elen Franklen于1575年出生在威尔士格拉莫爾根斯萊德时，她的父亲Thomas Franklen29岁，母亲Jonet Delamare25岁。她于大约1594年与Francis Bowen在威尔士格拉莫爾根利朗尼斯结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1638年在她的家乡享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: Franklen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Franklin
meanings: English: status name from Middle English frankeleyn ‘freeman, freeholder, land-owner of free but not noble birth’ (Anglo-Norman French fraunclein). In general, he was a gentleman ranked above the main body of minor freeholders but below a knight or a member of the nobility.
Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames, such as   Frankel  .

History: The American statesman and scientist Benjamin Franklin (1706–90) was the son of Josiah Franklin, a chandler (dealer in soap and candles), who had emigrated c. 1682 from Ecton, Northamptonshire, to Boston, MA, where his son was born.

nameMeanings.name: Elen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Helen , now also used outside Wales. It is identical with the Welsh vocabulary word elen ‘nymph’, but this is unlikely to be the origin. It is found in Welsh texts from an early period as an equivalent of Helen, for example as the name of the mother of Constantine, finder of the True Cross.

en.lifeSummary: When Elen Franklen was born in 1575, in Slade, Glamorgan, Wales, her father, Thomas Franklen, was 29 and her mother, Jonet Delamare, was 25. She married Francis Bowen about 1594, in Llangennith, Glamorgan, Wales. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1638, in her hometown, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elen Franklen est née en 1575, à Slade, Glamorgan, Galles, son père, Thomas Franklen, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Jonet Delamare, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Francis Bowen environ 1594, à Llangennith, Glamorgan, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1638, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elen Franklen 1575 in Slade, Glamorgan, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Franklen 29 und ihre Mutter Jonet Delamare 25. Sie hat um 1594 in Llangennith, Glamorgan, Wales Francis Bowen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1638 im Alter von 63 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elen Franklen è nata il nel 1575 nel Slade, Glamorgan, Galles, sua padre, Thomas Franklen, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Jonet Delamare, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Francis Bowen circa 1594, nel Llangennith, Glamorgan, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1638, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elen Franklenが1575年にウェールズグラモーガンスラドで生まれた時，父Thomas Franklenは29歳，母Jonet Delamareは25歳であった。約1594年にウェールズグラモーガンランジェニスでFrancis Bowenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1638年に故郷で63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elen Franklen(이)가 1575년 웨일스 글램르건 슬라드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Franklen(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jonet Delamare(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 대략 1594년 웨일스 글램르건 랭니스에서 Francis Bowen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1638년 그녀의 고향에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elen Franklen nasceu em 1575, em Slade, Glamorgan, Gales, seu pai, Thomas Franklen, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Jonet Delamare, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Francis Bowen aproximadamente 1594, em Llangennith, Glamorgan, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1638, em sua cidade natal, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elen Franklen родилась в 1575 г. в местности слад, глэморган, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Thomas Franklen было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Jonet Delamare, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Francis Bowen около 1594 г. в местности ллангеннит, глэморган, Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1638 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 63 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elen Franklen nació en 1575, en Slade, Glamorgan, Gales, su papá, Thomas Franklen, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Jonet Delamare, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Francis Bowen aproximadamente 1594, en Llangennith, Glamorgan, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1638, en su pueblo, a la edad de 63 años.
